IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Must pre-approve GNDM transfer."}},"notice":"Battle contract for GundariuM TCG.         Uses a hybrid on-chain/off-chain model:         - Session creation and GNDM stake locking happen on-chain.         - Battle resolution happens off-chain by the trusted game server.         - The server submits an EIP-712 signed BattleResult for settlement.         This keeps gas costs to one transaction per battle (not one per eip712Domain().details: returns the fields and values that describe the domain separator used by this contract for EIP-712 signature.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.cardTokenId: The player's GunplaCard token to use.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

claimPVEReward(uint256).notice: Claim PVE reward after the server settles the battle.

joinPVP(uint256,uint256).notice: Join an existing PVP session as player 2.         Stake must match player 1's stake.

settleBattle(uint256,address,uint16,uint.notice: Settle a completed battle. The result must be signed by the         trusted off-chain game server using EIP-712.         For PVP: winner receives their stake back plus (loser_stake * (100 - fee) / 100).         For PVE: winner must call claimPVEReward separately.

startPVE(uint256,uint256).notice: Start a PVE campaign battle. Locks `pveEntryFee` GNDM.         Must pre-approve GNDM transfer.

startPVP(uint256,uint256).notice: Enter the PVP queue. Stakes `stakeAmount` GNDM.         Must pre-approve GNDM transfer.
